% ============================================================================
%  MOJAVE RUN CARD  --  TEMPLATE ENGINE
%  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Do NOT edit this file for a normal run. Put values in runcard-config.tex.
%
%  Build:   pdflatex runcard.tex   (run once; no bibtex/biber needed)
%  or:      make
%
%  Inputs (all optional except the config):
%    runcard-config.tex   required  -- the parameter file
%    domains.csv          optional  -- per-domain accuracy + CIs
%    rawdata.csv          optional  -- arbitrary-length raw data dump
% ============================================================================
\documentclass[10pt]{article}

\usepackage[a4paper,margin=20mm,headheight=14pt]{geometry}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\IfFileExists{lmodern.sty}{%
  \usepackage{lmodern}%
  \IfFileExists{microtype.sty}{\usepackage{microtype}}{}%
}{%
  % No scalable Latin Modern: skip microtype to avoid bitmap-font errors.
}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{csvsimple}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- palette ----
\definecolor{rcink}{HTML}{1A1A1A}
\definecolor{rcaccent}{HTML}{B3541E}
\definecolor{rcrule}{HTML}{C9C2B6}
\definecolor{rcsoft}{HTML}{F4F1EA}
\definecolor{rcmute}{HTML}{6B6B6B}
\color{rcink}

% ============================================================================
%  PARAMETER STORE
%  \rcset{key}{value} stores; \rc{key} retrieves; missing/empty -> em-dash.
% ============================================================================
\makeatletter
\newcommand{\rcset}[2]{\expandafter\def\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname{#2}}
\newcommand{\rc}[1]{%
  \ifcsname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \expandafter\let\expandafter\rc@cur\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \ifx\rc@cur\@empty\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}%
    \else\rc@cur\fi
  \else\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}\fi}

% ---------------------------------------------------- histogram (sparkbar) ----
% \rchist{key}  draws a small bar histogram from a stored comma list of bin
% counts. Missing/empty -> muted placeholder. Values are pure numbers, so
% \edef-expansion here is safe.
\newcommand{\rchist}[1]{%
  \ifcsname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \edef\rc@list{\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname}%
  \else\let\rc@list\@empty\fi
  \ifx\rc@list\@empty\textcolor{rcmute}{\textit{(no histogram data)}}\else
  \begin{tikzpicture}[baseline=-2pt]
    \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcmax}{0}%
    \foreach \v in \rc@list{%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcmax}{max(\rcmax,\v)}\xdef\rcmax{\rcmax}}%
    \def\rcx{0}%
    \foreach \v in \rc@list{%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcbh}{(\rcmax>0)*(\v/\rcmax)*1.25 + 0.012}%
      \fill[rcaccent] (\rcx,0) rectangle ++(0.30,\rcbh);%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcx}{\rcx+0.36}\xdef\rcx{\rcx}}%
    \draw[rcrule,line width=0.4pt] (-0.02,0) -- (\rcx,0);%
  \end{tikzpicture}\fi}

% --------------------------------------------------------- section styling ----
\titleformat{\section}{\normalfont\large\bfseries\color{rcink}}{}{0pt}%
  {\rule[-3pt]{0pt}{14pt}}[{\color{rcrule}\titlerule[1pt]}]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{16pt}{8pt}
\setlist{nosep,leftmargin=1.4em}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.28}

% key/value "fact" row: robust, page-breakable, no array passes
\newenvironment{rcfacts}{\par\smallskip}{\par}
\newcommand{\fact}[2]{%
  \noindent
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.25\linewidth}\raggedright\strut
    \bfseries\color{rcmute}#1\end{minipage}%
  \hfill
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.71\linewidth}\raggedright\strut #2\end{minipage}%
  \par\smallskip}

% small inline "stat chip"
\newcommand{\stat}[2]{%
  \begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{}}%
  {\footnotesize\color{rcmute}#1}\\[1pt]{\large #2}%
  \end{tabular}}

% ---------------------------------------------------- header / footer ----
\pagestyle{fancy}\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
\lhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}MOJAVE RUN CARD}
\rhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}
\cfoot{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\thepage}

% --------------------------------------------- disclaimer defaults ----
% Overridable from the config via \rcset{disc.*}{...}.
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.localindep}}{\rcset{disc.localindep}{%
  \textbf{Local independence is violated.} All perturbation variants share a
  single set of model weights; responses are not conditionally independent
  given ability. IRT standard errors are therefore optimistic.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.noref}}{\rcset{disc.noref}{%
  \textbf{No reference population.} $\theta$ estimates are descriptive of this
  model on this instrument only. They are not norm-referenced and must not be
  compared across models without re-anchoring.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.2pl}}{\rcset{disc.2pl}{%
  \textbf{2PL estimates are exploratory.} Discrimination parameters and their
  standard errors are anti-conservative; report 1PL/Rasch as primary.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.unidim}}{\rcset{disc.unidim}{%
  \textbf{Unidimensionality not tested.} The presence of subdomains makes a
  single latent trait implausible; fit statistics should be read accordingly.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.stopping}}{\rcset{disc.stopping}{%
  \textbf{Retrospective only.} Sequential-stopping figures are counterfactual
  replays over permutations of an already-collected sample. They are NOT a
  prospective error guarantee for a future early-stopped run.}}{}
\makeatother

% ============================================================================
%  LOAD PARAMETERS
% ============================================================================
\input{runcard-config.tex}

\begin{document}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- TITLE ----
\begin{center}
  {\Huge\bfseries Mojave Run Card}\\[4pt]
  {\color{rcmute}\small Evaluation Instrument \& Sensitivity Report}
\end{center}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}
\vspace{6pt}
\noindent
\stat{RUN ID}{\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}\hfill
\stat{DATE ISSUED}{\rc{date.issued}}\hfill
\stat{OVERALL ACC.}{\rc{acc.overall}}\hfill
\stat{WILSON 95\% CI}{[\rc{wilson.lower},\,\rc{wilson.upper}]}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}

% --------------------------------------------------------------- HEADER ----
\section{Header}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Run ID}{\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}
\fact{Date issued}{\rc{date.issued}}
\fact{Benchmark}{\rc{benchmark.name} \,\textbar\, \rc{benchmark.version} \\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{source:} \rc{benchmark.source}}
\fact{Model under test}{\rc{model.name}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{revision:} \rc{model.revision} \quad
  \textcolor{rcmute}{quant:} \rc{model.quant}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{serving:} \rc{model.serving}}
\fact{Evaluator}{\rc{evaluator.org} \,\textbar\, \rc{evaluator.tool}}
\end{rcfacts}

% --------------------------------------------------------------- DESIGN ----
\section{Design}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{N items}{\rc{n.items}}
\fact{N variants}{\rc{n.variants}}
\fact{Perturbation design}{\rc{perturb.design}}
\fact{Inference config / variant}{\rc{inference.config}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ----------------------------------------------------- AGGREGATE RESULTS ----
\section{Aggregate Results}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Overall accuracy}{\rc{acc.overall}}
\fact{Wilson 95\% CI}{lower \rc{wilson.lower} \quad upper \rc{wilson.upper}
  \quad width \rc{wilson.width}}
\fact{Baseline variant}{\rc{acc.baseline}}
\end{rcfacts}

\IfFileExists{domains.csv}{%
  \par\medskip\noindent\textbf{\color{rcmute}Per-domain accuracy + 95\% CIs}
  \par\smallskip
  \csvreader[
    tabular={@{}l r r r r@{}},
    respect all,
    table head={\toprule\bfseries Domain & \bfseries Acc. &
      \bfseries CI low & \bfseries CI high & \bfseries N\\\midrule},
    table foot={\bottomrule},
    late after line=\\,
  ]{domains.csv}{}{\csvcoli & \csvcolii & \csvcoliii & \csvcoliv & \csvcolv}%
}{%
  \par\smallskip\textcolor{rcmute}{\itshape No \texttt{domains.csv} supplied
  --- per-domain breakdown omitted (no domains defined).}\par}

% ------------------------------------------------ INSTRUMENT QUALITY (IRT) ----
\section{Instrument Quality (IRT)}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Model fitted}{\rc{irt.model}}
\fact{Difficulty distribution}{mean \rc{irt.diff.mean}\quad SD \rc{irt.diff.sd}
  \quad min \rc{irt.diff.min}\quad max \rc{irt.diff.max}\\[3pt]
  \rchist{irt.diff.hist}}
\fact{Discrimination (2PL)}{mean \rc{irt.disc.mean}\quad SD \rc{irt.disc.sd}
  \quad min \rc{irt.disc.min}\quad max \rc{irt.disc.max}\\[3pt]
  \rchist{irt.disc.hist}\\[3pt]
  \textcolor{rcaccent}{\small$\triangle$ \rc{irt.disc.caveat}}}
\fact{Floor / ceiling items}{\rc{irt.floor.items} at 0\% \quad
  \rc{irt.ceil.items} at 100\% (across variants)}
\fact{Near-zero discrimination}{\rc{irt.nearzero.disc} items (2PL)}
\fact{Q3 residual correlations}{\rc{q3.summary}\quad
  count $|Q_3|>0.2$: \rc{q3.count.gt2}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{\small\rc{q3.note}}}
\end{rcfacts}

% --------------------------------------------- PERTURBATION SENSITIVITY ----
\section{Perturbation Sensitivity}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Per-item stability}{fraction correct across variants\\[3pt]
  \rchist{stab.hist}}
\fact{Stable items}{\rc{stab.stable} \quad
  \textcolor{rcmute}{($>0.9$ or $<0.1$ fraction correct)}}
\fact{Sensitive items}{\rc{stab.sensitive} \quad
  \textcolor{rcmute}{($0.3$--$0.7$ fraction correct)}}
\fact{Dimension attribution}{order-sensitive \rc{dim.order}\quad
  temperature \rc{dim.temp}\quad prompt \rc{dim.prompt}\quad
  mixed \rc{dim.mixed}}
\fact{Spearman: stability vs.\ difficulty}{$\rho=\rc{spearman.diff.rho}$
  \quad 95\% CI [\rc{spearman.diff.lo},\,\rc{spearman.diff.hi}]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{\footnotesize\ (bootstrap)}}
\fact{Spearman: stability vs.\ discrimination}{$\rho=\rc{spearman.disc.rho}$
  \quad 95\% CI [\rc{spearman.disc.lo},\,\rc{spearman.disc.hi}]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{\footnotesize\ (bootstrap)}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ---------------------------------------- SENSITIVITY DECOMPOSITION (Sobol') ----
\section{Sensitivity Decomposition \textnormal{\small(Sobol')}}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Design}{\rc{sobol.design}}
\fact{Sample size}{$N = \rc{sobol.N.base}$, $k = \rc{sobol.k}$,
  total cells $= \rc{sobol.n.cells}$}
\fact{Dominant factor}{\rc{sobol.dominant}}
\fact{Sum diagnostic}{$\sum S_i = \rc{sobol.sum.S1}$ \quad
  $\sum S_{T_i} = \rc{sobol.sum.ST}$
  \textcolor{rcmute}{\footnotesize\ ($\sum S_i \approx 1$ if additive;
  $\sum S_{T_i} > 1$ indicates interactions)}}
\fact{Sobol' indices}{\rc{sobol.table}}
\fact{Borgonovo $\delta$}{\rc{borgonovo.table}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------------ SEQUENTIAL STOPPING (RETROSPECTIVE) ----
\section{Sequential Stopping \textnormal{\small(Retrospective)}}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Method}{\rc{sprt.method}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{mixing:} \rc{sprt.beta} \quad
  \textcolor{rcmute}{$\alpha$:} \rc{sprt.alpha}}
\fact{N permutations}{\rc{sprt.nperm}}
\fact{Median stopping time}{\rc{sprt.median.stop} \quad
  IQR [\rc{sprt.iqr.lo},\,\rc{sprt.iqr.hi}]}
\fact{Fraction stopped}{before $N/4$: \rc{sprt.frac.q4}\quad
  before $N/2$: \rc{sprt.frac.half}\quad
  before $N$: \rc{sprt.frac.full}}
\fact{Caveat}{\textcolor{rcaccent}{\rc{disc.stopping}}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ----------------------------------------------------------- DISCLAIMERS ----
\section{Disclaimers}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em,itemsep=4pt]
  \item \rc{disc.localindep}
  \item \rc{disc.noref}
  \item \rc{disc.2pl}
  \item \rc{disc.unidim}
\end{itemize}

% ------------------------------------------------------- AUDIT TRAIL ----
\section{Audit Trail}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Chain tip}{\rc{audit.chain.tip}}
\fact{Chain seq}{\rc{audit.chain.seq}}
\fact{Signed}{\rc{audit.signed}}
\fact{Verify}{\texttt{mojave audit verify -{}-chain data/audit/chain.jsonl}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------------------------------ RAW DATA REFERENCE ----
\section{Raw Data Reference}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Companion file}{\rc{companion.file}}
\fact{Hash}{\rc{companion.hash}}
\fact{Contents}{\rc{companion.contents}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ---- Arbitrary-length raw data dump --------------------------------------
% Reads rawdata.csv if present and paginates over any number of rows via
% longtable. Columns are taken automatically from the CSV header, so the
% schema can change without editing this template. \detokenize keeps
% _ # $ % & { } literal so JSON-ish raw fields never break the build.
\IfFileExists{rawdata.csv}{%
  \par\medskip\noindent\textbf{\color{rcmute}Raw data (verbatim, paginated)}
  \par\smallskip
  {\footnotesize\ttfamily
  \csvreader[
    respect all,
    longtable=@{}>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.10\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.10\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.20\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.16\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.16\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.16\linewidth}@{},
    table head={\toprule\bfseries item\_id & \bfseries variant\_id &
      \bfseries prompt\_hash & \bfseries correct & \bfseries theta &
      \bfseries stop\_t\\\midrule\endhead
      \midrule\multicolumn{6}{r}{\itshape continued on next page}\\
      \endfoot\bottomrule\endlastfoot},
  ]{rawdata.csv}{}{%
    \csvcoli & \csvcolii & \csvcoliii &
    \csvcoliv & \csvcolv & \csvcolvi}%
  }%
}{%
  \par\smallskip\textcolor{rcmute}{\itshape No \texttt{rawdata.csv} supplied
  --- inline raw dump omitted. The companion file above remains the
  authoritative record.}\par}

\end{document}
